data.title: Ichiyoshi Securities Reports Strong Earnings Growth for First Half of Fiscal 2025
data.description:
An announcement from Ichiyoshi Securities Co ( (JP:8624) ) is now available.

Ichiyoshi Securities Co., Ltd. reported a significant increase in its preliminary consolidated earnings for the first half of fiscal 2025, with operating revenue rising by 9% and net income attributable to owners up by 23.5% compared to the same period in the previous year. This growth is attributed to the steady progress of its ‘Stock-Type Business Model,’ which led to increased operating revenue from stable-income sources such as beneficiary certificates and commissions.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:8624) stock is a Hold with a Yen851.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Ichiyoshi Securities Co stock, see the JP:8624 Stock Forecast page.

More about Ichiyoshi Securities Co

Ichiyoshi Securities Co., Ltd. is a company listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange, primarily operating in the financial instruments trading industry. The company focuses on providing services such as fund-wrap accounts and investment trusts, which contribute to its stable-income sources.

Average Trading Volume: 104,459

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: Yen26.45B

Learn more about 8624 stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: 360 Capital Group Announces Director’s Change in Securities Interest
data.description:
360 Capital Group Limited ( (AU:TGP) ) has provided an update.

360 Capital Group Limited announced a change in the director’s interest, with Andrew G Moffat disposing of 2,583,079 fully paid ordinary stapled securities through an off-market transaction. This change reflects a strategic move following the acceptance of a takeover offer, potentially impacting the company’s shareholder structure and market positioning.

data.title: Rakuten Issues Unsecured Undated Bonds to Enhance Financial Flexibility
data.description:
Rakuten ( (JP:4755) ) has provided an announcement.

Rakuten Group, Inc. has announced the issuance of unsecured undated bonds with interest payment deferral and optional redemption clauses, structured to receive a 50% equity credit from rating agencies. The proceeds from these bonds will be used to redeem or repurchase existing USD-denominated subordinated notes, enhancing Rakuten’s financial flexibility and potentially strengthening its market position.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:4755) stock is a Hold with a Yen850.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Rakuten stock, see the JP:4755 Stock Forecast page.

More about Rakuten

Rakuten Group, Inc. is a prominent player in the e-commerce and internet services industry, offering a wide range of services including online retail, digital content, fintech, and communications. The company is listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange Prime Market and is known for its innovative approach to integrating technology and commerce.

data.title: PolyNovo Appoints Robert Douglas as Non-Executive Director
data.description:
Polynovo ( (AU:PNV) ) has provided an update.

PolyNovo Limited has announced the appointment of Mr. Robert Douglas as a new Non-Executive Director, with a resolution for his election to be proposed at the upcoming Annual General Meeting. Mr. Douglas brings extensive experience from his previous role as Global Chief Operating Officer at ResMed, and his expertise is expected to enhance the board’s skillset and governance, benefiting the company and its stakeholders.

data.title: Recruit Holdings Completes Share Repurchase to Boost Capital Efficiency
data.description:
Recruit Holdings Co ( (JP:6098) ) has issued an announcement.

Recruit Holdings Co., Ltd. has completed a share repurchase of 1,111,100 shares through the ToSTNeT-3 system, aiming to improve capital efficiency and maximize shareholder returns. The repurchase, valued at approximately 8.5 billion yen, is part of a broader plan to buy back up to 38 million shares by April 2026, reflecting the company’s strategic focus on optimizing its financial position and market conditions.

data.title: Skylark Minerals Announces AGM Details and Electronic Voting Options
data.description:
Ironbark Zinc Ltd ( (AU:SKM) ) has shared an update.

Skylark Minerals Ltd has announced the details of its upcoming Annual General Meeting, which will take place on November 27, 2025, at the Vibe Hotel in Subiaco, Western Australia. Shareholders are encouraged to participate by voting in person or by proxy, with proxy instructions due by November 25, 2025. The company has opted to distribute meeting materials electronically, aligning with modern communication practices and reducing physical mailings.
